productDisplayName: Nike Men Mercurial Victory II HG-V Fluorescent Green Sports Shoes
description: Built for speed on hard grounds, the nike Mercurial Victory II range of lightweight soccer cleats are designed for that revolutionary speed, coupled with ultimate traction, cushioning and control. The entire shoe is designed such that it mirrors the shape of the foot and offers a premium Fit allowing you to strike the ball fast and clear.Target victory on grassy fieldsConstructed with soft, supple, synthetic leather for that ideal fit, stability and better ball feel and control, the nike Mercurial Victory II shoe is configured with firm ground (FG) cleats that can be used on short grass fields that may be slightly damp, but not muddy. It has a contoured sockliner to ensure a snug and protective fit for the foot and a traditional lacing system that ensures that the cleat fits well and stays snug around the foot.Its innovative vapour traction island pattern makes this low profile Nike Victory shoe deliver targeted traction where the player needs it most. This special shoe engineering concept with special TPU bladed studs aids quicker acceleration of players at scintillating speed, making a game of soccer one of the most pleasurable Sports to ever play.UpperUltra-lightweight synthetic leather adjusts to the foot shape and works to keep feet locked in place Lace-ups for a snug fit Bold graphic on the uppers for a stylish look Contoured speed last for an ergonomic fit Full-length glass-fibre chassis for responsive energy and a firm yet flexible fit Cushioning at the heel provides a more comfortable feel and helps keep the heel from slippingMidsoleContoured sockliner at the midsole for cushioning to reduce stud pressureOutsoleGlass-fibre outsole engineered for responsiveness and explosive bursts of speed while ensuring excellent traction Firm, yet flexible outsole that helps reduce stud pressure Hard-ground (HG) studs for use on wet and muddy fields that require maximum tractionWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
